case_title: TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. LUBBIE SEVIER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEVIER, LUBBIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 230 EDDY STREET, #312 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SEVIER, LUBBIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED JUN-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEVIER, LUBBIE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SEVIER, LUBBIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SEVIER, LUBBIE
